title: Dashboard 307 Sitemap Fix — FINAL DECISION (Day 5 Phase 13C.6)
why_in_sitemap: Next.js App Router auto-discovers routes. Dashboard pages exist as /src/app/dashboard/ route files and are picked up by sitemap generator.
fix_deferred_reason: 3 URLs out of 651 (0.46%). Google handles 307 redirects correctly. Fix requires modifying sitemap.ts to exclude /dashboard/* routes. LOW PRIORITY — not blocking growth. Added to sitemap cleanup backlog for next maintenance cycle.
risk_of_no_action: NONE — Google ignores 307 redirect URLs in sitemap. This is a sitemap hygiene improvement, not a ranking or indexing issue.
user_impact: NONE — Dashboard functionality is completely unaffected.
recommendation: Exclude /dashboard/* in sitemap.ts when next doing sitemap maintenance. Not urgent.
